-  FFCAP_ET_DAMPER 

Global Variable# FFCAP_ET_DAMPER

Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.2+

```
var FFCAP_ET_DAMPER: Int { get }
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/forcefeedback/ffcap_et_damper#Discussion)

The effect represents a damper force effect.
